title: School development & action planning
statusLabel: Early exploration — review not yet started
journey: Self-evaluation finds the problems; this feature is meant to turn those findings — plus any other improvement priority a school has — into an owned, measurable plan with a real review cycle, rather than a document that gets written once and never revisited. It's designed to link to self-evaluation evidence without duplicating or rewriting it, and to work as its own standalone space even for a school not yet using the self-evaluation feature. This is the earliest-stage item on this page — the plan exists, but independent design review of it hasn't started yet.

subfeatures.name: Standalone module home
subfeatures.note: Works even for a school with no self-evaluation data yet.

subfeatures.name: Development plan lifecycle
subfeatures.note: Create, review, approve, archive, and roll a plan forward year to year.

subfeatures.name: Improvement priorities
subfeatures.note: Strategic priorities with an intended outcome and a named owner.

subfeatures.name: Success measures
subfeatures.note: A real baseline, target, and evidence — not just 'task completed'.

subfeatures.name: Actions linked to real tasks
subfeatures.note: Strategic actions connected to the same task records the rest of Mosaic uses.

subfeatures.name: Monitoring reviews
subfeatures.note: Periodic check-ins on progress and impact, not a one-off write-up.

subfeatures.name: Leadership summary export
subfeatures.note: A shareable summary, designed to avoid presenting a misleadingly simple improvement score.

testing.fixtureNote: The shared test data set still has no action-planning entries — deliberately, since nothing has been built. What's new is a first outcomes register for this feature: three boundary statements that pin down what should not exist yet, so it's easy to confirm the ground stays clear until the design review has run.

expectedOutcomes.expected: Browsing the whole app today — in the quick-preview mode or signed in — shows no action-planning page, menu entry, or hidden switch. None is allowed until the design review concludes.
expectedOutcomes.enforcedBy: Documented boundary — no automated check yet; holds until the review concludes

expectedOutcomes.criterion: No action-planning data structures exist yet
expectedOutcomes.expected: The app's database contains no action-planning tables or access rules. Database changes only arrive with an accepted design.
expectedOutcomes.enforcedBy: Documented boundary — no automated check yet

expectedOutcomes.criterion: The future link from self-evaluation is reserved, not built
expectedOutcomes.expected: The shared test data already includes self-evaluation next steps, and the intention is that those will one day feed into action plans. That behaviour doesn't exist yet; when the review settles it, the test data and this register will be updated together.
expectedOutcomes.enforcedBy: Documented gap — to become real checks alongside the first build
